basic_info.name: Brick Award
basic_info.description: The Brick Award is an international architecture award for outstanding brick architecture. The nominated projects and winners are selected every two years and published in the Brick Book.

What is the Brick Award The Brick Award is an international established award and presents outstanding brick architecture. Created to offer architects and their unique designs the platform they deserve. Brick and ceramic building products as a timeless building material for innovative and forward-looking architecture. © Marc Goodwin © Marc Goodwin How to participate in the Brick Award The submission for Brick Award 26 is over. The submission is free of charge.
